summary: iter183 Guest Concierge Mobile App - comprehensive testing complete. All 27 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend fully verified: landing page, authentication, guest app with 8 quick-action cards, venues view (6 items), nearby view (3 items), valet/transport/luggage requests, sign out. Admin token rotation verified (old token returns 401, new token works). Regression tests passed for iter179 mobile concierge and iter182 shared board.
seed_data_creation: Used seeded demo guests (g_williams_r1208, g_santos_r714, g_okafor_r902), 6 venues, 3 nearby items
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter183 Guest Concierge fully tested. Admin token rotated - update any scripts using old token. Guest auth uses room + last_name (case-insensitive substring match). Session stored in sessionStorage (not localStorage) with key 'echoai3_guest_token'. 48h TTL. Routes: /guest (landing), /guest/app (authenticated). Auto-auth via /guest?room=X&last=Y. All 15+ guest-concierge endpoints working.

guest_authentication.POST /api/guest-concierge/authenticate: PASS - returns token + guest bundle on match
guest_authentication.400_missing_fields: PASS - returns 400/422 for missing room or last_name
guest_authentication.case_insensitive: PASS - last name matching is case-insensitive

guest_session.GET /api/guest-concierge/session: PASS - returns guest info with valid token

map.GET /api/guest-concierge/map: PASS - returns property metadata + venue pins

service_requests.POST /api/guest-concierge/valet: PASS - creates valet request with 10-min ETA

cross_guest_isolation.isolation_test: PASS - guest A cannot see guest B's requests

frontend.guest_landing: PASS - data-testid='guest-landing', room + last name inputs, Enter button
frontend.error_handling: PASS - shows error message for bad credentials
frontend.valet_toast: PASS - clicking qa-valet triggers POST and shows toast
frontend.venues_view: PASS - shows 6 venue cards with photos
frontend.nearby_view: PASS - shows 3 nearby items with ratings
frontend.sign_out: PASS - clears sessionStorage token and redirects to /guest
